finding: backend/main.py = 17,749 lines vs a committed ceiling of 17,747. The split plan (docs/security/main-split-plan.md) was written when main.py was ~12,095 lines with 365 route handlers. It has since grown 47% PAST the size that triggered the plan. The plan is being ignored.
decision: I am NOT raising the ceiling to make the suite green. That would be gaming the exact class of guardrail I spent today defending. A red test telling the truth is worth more than a green one that lies. The honest fix is to actually extract endpoints into backend/routers/.
